moments.title: FIFA World Cup Group Stages Continue
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage is in full swing, with key matches including Scotland vs Morocco today and England playing next week.

angles.name: Today's Matches
angles.copy: It's World Cup action today! Scotland take on Morocco in a crucial group stage clash. Who are you backing? #FIFAWorldCup2026

angles.name: England's Next Game
angles.copy: Looking ahead in the World Cup! England's next group stage game is against Panama on June 27th. Get ready for the Three Lions! #England

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival runs from June 18-21, bringing a diverse lineup of rock, pop, and electronic artists to Newport.

angles.name: Live from the Island
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival is LIVE this weekend! Who's there enjoying the music and island vibes? #IOW2026

angles.name: Weekend Festival Vibes
angles.copy: From rock legends to emerging artists, Isle of Wight Festival is delivering the ultimate summer soundtrack. What's been your highlight so far?

moments.title: Sophie Ellis-Bextor at Hampton Court
moments.blurb: Sophie Ellis-Bextor brings her Palace Disco to the stunning Hampton Court Palace Festival tonight, June 19th.

angles.name: Disco at the Palace
angles.copy: Tonight! Sophie Ellis-Bextor takes over Hampton Court Palace with her incredible Palace Disco. Get those dancing shoes ready! #SophieEllisBextor

angles.name: Pop Queen Live
angles.copy: Pop royalty in a royal setting! Sophie Ellis-Bextor live at Hampton Court Palace Festival is going to be sparkling. Who's heading there?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Hits Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow's TRNSMT Festival is on this weekend, June 19-21, featuring headliners like The Lumineers, The Proclaimers, and KT Tunstall.

angles.name: Glasgow's Big Weekend
angles.copy: TRNSMT Festival is taking over Glasgow Green this weekend! The Lumineers, The Proclaimers & more are set to light up the stage. #TRNSMT

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: It's all happening in Glasgow! Who's catching their favourite acts at TRNSMT this weekend? #TRNSMTFestival

moments.title: Parklife Festival in Manchester
moments.blurb: Parklife Festival brings a massive lineup to Manchester's Heaton Park this weekend, June 20-21, for two days of music.

angles.name: Manchester's Party Weekend
angles.copy: Parklife Festival takes over Heaton Park tomorrow! Ready for a huge weekend of music in Manchester? #Parklife2026

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to Parklife is on! Who's heading to Heaton Park for one of the biggest festivals of the summer? #Parklife

moments.title: New Music Friday: Hard-Fi, Myles Smith & More
moments.blurb: This New Music Friday sees new albums from Hard-Fi and Myles Smith, plus releases from FKA Twigs and Kehlani, and a new version of Culture Club's 'Karma Chameleon'.

angles.name: Hard-Fi's Return
angles.copy: It's New Music Friday! Hard-Fi are back with their first album in 15 years, 'Sweating Someone Else's Fever'. Who's giving it a listen? #HardFi

angles.name: Boy George's New Karma
angles.copy: A brand new version of Culture Club's 'Karma Chameleon' is out today, released to celebrate Boy George's recent 65th birthday! #BoyGeorge

angles.name: Fresh Sounds
angles.copy: Myles Smith drops his debut album, 'My Mess, My Heart, My Life', today! Plus new music from FKA Twigs and Kehlani. What's on your playlist? #NewMusic

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year and the astronomical start of summer, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! The Summer Solstice arrives on Sunday, June 21st. How will you be making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Stonehenge Celebrations
angles.copy: Thousands will gather at Stonehenge for sunrise on Sunday to celebrate the Summer Solstice. It's a truly ancient tradition! #Stonehenge

moments.title: UK Heatwave Warning
moments.blurb: Southern and Eastern England are experiencing a heatwave, with temperatures potentially reaching 32-33°C this weekend and into early next week, prompting a Heat-Health Alert.

angles.name: Heatwave Alert
angles.copy: Southern and Eastern England are under a Heat-Health Alert as temperatures soar to the high 20s and low 30s this weekend. Stay safe and hydrated! #HeatwaveUK

angles.name: Cool Down Tips
angles.copy: With temperatures rising, remember to stay cool and check on vulnerable friends and family. What are your top tips for beating the heat?

moments.title: Happy 63rd to Paula Abdul
moments.blurb: Pop icon, dancer, and choreographer Paula Abdul celebrates her 63rd birthday today, June 19th.

angles.name: Forever Your Girl
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 63rd birthday to the incredible Paula Abdul! From 'Straight Up' to 'Opposites Attract', what's your favourite Paula track?

moments.title: Happy 75th to Ann Wilson (Heart)
moments.blurb: Ann Wilson, the powerhouse vocalist of rock legends Heart, turns 75 today, June 19th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the iconic Ann Wilson from Heart! Her voice is truly legendary. What's your go-to Heart anthem? #AnnWilson

moments.title: Happy 43rd to Macklemore
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper Macklemore, known for hits like 'Thrift Shop' and 'Can't Hold Us', celebrates his 43rd birthday today, June 19th.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 43rd birthday to the one and only Macklemore! What's your favourite track from the Seattle rapper? #Macklemore

moments.title: Happy 57th to Gabrielle
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Gabrielle, famous for hits like 'Dreams' and 'Rise', turns 57 today, June 19th.

angles.name: UK Soul Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to the fantastic Gabrielle! Her voice is timeless. What's your favourite Gabrielle song? #Gabrielle

moments.title: Happy 82nd to Ray Davies (The Kinks)
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Ray Davies, frontman of The Kinks, celebrates his 82nd birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Kinks Icon
angles.copy: Sunday is Ray Davies' 82nd birthday! The visionary behind The Kinks gave us so many classics. Which Kinks track is your all-time favourite? #RayDavies

moments.title: Happy 41st to Lana Del Rey
moments.blurb: Acclaimed singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey turns 41 on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Alternative Pop Queen
angles.copy: On Sunday, Lana Del Rey celebrates her 41st birthday! Her unique sound continues to captivate. What's your favourite Lana Del Rey album? #LanaDelRey

moments.title: Happy 45th to Brandon Flowers (The Killers)
moments.blurb: Brandon Flowers, the charismatic frontman of The Killers, celebrates his 45th birthday on Sunday, June 21st.

angles.name: Killers Frontman
angles.copy: Sunday marks Brandon Flowers' 45th birthday! The voice of The Killers has given us so many anthems. Which one gets you every time? #BrandonFlowers

moments.title: Happy 73rd to Cyndi Lauper
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning pop icon Cyndi Lauper, known for her distinctive voice and hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', turns 73 on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: 80s Pop Icon
angles.copy: Girls (and guys!) just want to wish Cyndi Lauper a very happy 73rd birthday on Monday! What's your favourite track from the colourful legend? #CyndiLauper

moments.title: Happy 65th to Jimmy Somerville
moments.blurb: Scottish singer Jimmy Somerville, known for his work with Bronski Beat and The Communards, celebrates his 65th birthday on Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: 80s Dance Legend
angles.copy: Smalltown Boy, big voice! Happy 65th birthday to the incredible Jimmy Somerville on Monday. What's your favourite track from Bronski Beat or The Communards? #JimmySomerville

moments.title: Happy 82nd to Carly Simon
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Carly Simon, famous for hits like 'You're So Vain', turns 82 on Thursday, June 25th.

angles.name: Timeless Songwriter
angles.copy: You're so... 82! Happy birthday to the legendary Carly Simon on Thursday. What's your favourite song from this iconic artist? #CarlySimon

moments.title: Upcoming UK Festivals: Outbreak & Blenheim
moments.blurb: Looking ahead, Outbreak Fest in Manchester (June 26-28) brings hardcore and alternative, while Blenheim Palace Festival (June 27-July 4) features Katy Perry, Alanis Morissette, and Michael Bublé.

angles.name: Heavy & Eclectic Lineups
angles.copy: Coming up next week: Outbreak Fest for hardcore fans in Manchester, and Blenheim Palace Festival with an amazing lineup including Katy Perry and Alanis Morissette! What are you most excited for?

angles.name: Diverse Summer Sounds
angles.copy: From the alternative sounds of Outbreak Fest to the pop and rock legends at Blenheim Palace, there's a festival for everyone starting next week! #MusicFestival
